context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses setChannelMetadata for rooms, setMemberships with custom role per membership, getMemberships and getChannelMembers with the embedded-object include flags, and removeMemberships.

checklist.name: setChannelMetadata for room
checklist.description: createRoom calls pubnub.objects.setChannelMetadata with channel, data.name, data.description, and data.custom

checklist.name: Bulk setMemberships
checklist.description: addUserToRooms calls pubnub.objects.setMemberships ONCE with a channels array containing all rooms, rather than looping and calling once per room

checklist.name: Role on membership not channel
checklist.description: The role is placed in each membership's custom field (channels[i].custom.role), NOT in the channel object's custom

checklist.name: getMemberships with channel hydration
checklist.description: listUserRooms calls pubnub.objects.getMemberships and passes include with at least channelFields: true and customChannelFields: true so the channel name, description, and custom are hydrated inline

checklist.name: getMemberships with customFields
checklist.description: listUserRooms passes include.customFields: true so the membership's role is visible in the response

checklist.name: getChannelMembers with user hydration
checklist.description: listRoomMembers calls pubnub.objects.getChannelMembers and passes include with at least UUIDFields: true and customUUIDFields: true so the user's name and custom are hydrated inline

checklist.name: removeMemberships for leave
checklist.description: removeUserFromRoom calls pubnub.objects.removeMemberships with uuid and channels: [roomId]

checklist.name: Explicit limit
checklist.description: listUserRooms and listRoomMembers pass an explicit limit parameter to their respective calls
